{{Infobox group
| name = Redmoon Emissaries
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Redmoon Emissaries]] are associated with actions taken against the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emissaries]] of [[Redmoon Hall]] surround [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Emissaries]] of [[Redmoon Hall]] were present and many were unconscious or groaning.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
